title: Update `docker/docker` (→ `moby/moby`) and `docker/cli` to v29.0.0
body:
A superset of #456 .

- Also migrate to the new `moby/moby/*` Go modules
- Update tests, allowing to remove more subpackages and test-only dependencies

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6494**
We would appreciate a release with this PR to satisfy govulncheck :)
